name: Macaroni Saute
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Uncooked elbow macaroni (or 8 oz Box of elbow macaroni)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, combine vegetable oil, macaroni, onion, green pepper, and garlic. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until the macaroni turns slightly yellow. Stir occasionally. Set aside.
2. In a 1-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic measuring cup, heat tomato juice, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 6 minutes or until the tomato juice comes to a boil.
3. Add salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce to the tomato juice. Stir to combine.
4. Pour the tomato juice mixture into the macaroni mixture. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 13 minutes or until the macaroni is tender.
